workflow.name: SDLC Required Plus Optional Assessor Approve
workflow.goal: Exercise a workflow where both the required assessor and an instantiated optional assessor approve before release packaging.

parameters.change_request: Add a deterministic low-risk report command to the seeded CLI and verify with ./scripts/verify.sh.
parameters.optional_assessor_contract: Instantiate the optional security assessor and approve the first revision if it stays deterministic, local, and low risk.

instructions.content: Keep the seeded Python CLI stack and verify with ./scripts/verify.sh.
